findings.description: The `table` tag is listed in the source tag file table but is absent from s3 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source tag table row: `table` — テーブルを出力するタグ

findings.description: PascalCase class names `ApplicationException`, `SqlResultSet`, and `MessageUtil` appear in the s4 code example but are missing from s4 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source code: `throw new ApplicationException(...)`, `SqlResultSet searchResult = null;`, `MessageUtil.createMessage(...)`

findings.description: Class name `W11AC01Action` and annotation names `@PropertyName`, `@Required`, `@NumberRange`, `@Digits`, `@OnError` appear in the s5 code examples but are absent from s5 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source code: `public class W11AC01Action extends DbAccessSupport`, `@PropertyName("ページ番号")`, `@Required`, `@NumberRange(max = 10, min = 1)`, `@Digits(integer = 2)`, `@OnError(type = ApplicationException.class, path = ...)`

findings.description: Raw RST cross-reference syntax is copied verbatim into knowledge file sections. These render as unresolvable literals in a JSON knowledge file. s4 contains `:ref:`ListSearchResult_Setting``, s6 contains `:ref:`ListSearchResult_Tag``.
findings.source_evidence: Source s4: 「検索結果件数の上限設定については、 :ref:`ListSearchResult_Setting` を参照。」/ Source s6: 「全ての属性の詳細については、 :ref:`ListSearchResult_Tag` を参照。」
